name: Crazy Quilt Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz.) kidney beans, rinsed and drained
1 can (15 oz.) lima beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
DRESSING:
1. Measure 1/3 cup vinegar.
2. Measure 1/4 cup vegetable oil.
3. Add 1 1/2 teaspoons ground mustard to the bowl.
4. Sprinkle 1 teaspoon dried thyme into the bowl.
5. Add 1/2 teaspoon salt to the ingredients in the bowl.
6. Sprinkle 1/4 teaspoon pepper into the bowl.
7. Sprinkle 1/4 teaspoon garlic powder into the bowl.
Combine all dressing ingredients together in a large bowl.
8. Pour the dressing over the bean mixture in another large bowl.
9. Mix well until the beans are evenly coated with the dressing.
10. Toss gently to combine the beans and vegetables.
11. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 6 hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
Yield: 10-12 servings
